headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Dollar Tree, Raises Price Target to $170
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Matthew Boss   maintains Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $160 to $170.
